title: Charred Borscht Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired soup made with charred vegetables and a hint of garlic. Perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Chop the red beetroot into medium-sized chunks.
Sauté the charred onions and minced garlic in a pan until softened.
Add the chopped beetroot, borscht, salt, and black pepper to the pan. Stir well.
Simmer the mixture for 20 minutes or until the beetroot is tender.
Tear the pillowy rye bread into small pieces and toast until crispy.
Stir in the sour cream to add a creamy touch to the soup.
Garnish with fresh dill and serve with toasted rye bread on the side.
